name_en: Ofuyu Site
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Ofuyu archaeological site. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1979-07-25.

name_en: Shakuma Site
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Shakuma archaeological site. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1980-07-01.

name_en: Site of the Former Takahashi Farm
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the site of the former Takahashi farm. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1979-07-25.

name_en: Birthplace of Bekkari
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the birthplace of the Bekkari district. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1980-07-01.

name_en: Entrance to the Former Mashike Mountain Road
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the entrance to the former Mashike mountain road. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1979-07-25.

name_en: Site of the Mashike County Office Branch
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the site of the Mashike county office branch. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1979-07-25.

name_en: Birthplace of Abun
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the birthplace of the Abun district. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1981-07-25.

name_romaji: Matsuura Takeshirō Nobusha Goe no Chi
name_en: Site Where Matsuura Takeshiro Crossed the Nobusha
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the site where Matsuura Takeshiro crossed the Nobusha. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1979-07-25.

name_en: Birthplace of Nobusha Paddy Field Farming
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) marking the birthplace of paddy field rice farming at Nobusha. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1982-08-20.

name_en: Ninara Mountain Road and Site of the Ninara Post Station
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Ninara mountain road and the site of the Ninara post station. It is a town-designated cultural property of Mashike Town, designated on 1980-07-01.

name_en: No. 1 Ishikari Benten Shrine
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the Ishikari Benten Shrine (designation No. 1). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1967-12-22, located at Benten-cho 18, Ishikari City.

name_en: No. 2 Taxidermy Specimen of a Sturgeon
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a taxidermy specimen of a sturgeon (designation No. 2). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1982-03-31, located at Benten-cho 30-4, Ishikari City (Sakyu no Kaze Museum), held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_romaji: Dai-sangō Ishikari Hachimanchō Iseki Wakkaoi Shutsudo no Doki Kyūten
name_en: No. 3 Nine Pieces of Pottery Excavated at Wakkaoi, Ishikari Hachimancho Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of nine pieces of pottery excavated at Wakkaoi of the Ishikari Hachimancho site (designation No. 3). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1982-03-31, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_en: No. 4 Former Nagano Store
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Nagano store (designation No. 4). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1994-03-28, located at Benten-cho 30-5, Ishikari City (next to the Sakyu no Kaze Museum).

name_en: No. 5 Kaneko Family Documents
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of documents of the Kaneko family (designation No. 5). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 1999-04-22, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_en: No. 6 Former Shiratori Fishing Lodge
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the former Shiratori banya (fishing lodge) (designation No. 6). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, located at Hamamasu 77, Hamamasu-ku, Ishikari City.

name_en: No. 7 Water Basin of the Ishikari Benten Shrine
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the chozubachi (water ablution basin) of the Ishikari Benten Shrine (designation No. 7). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2013-03-28, located at Benten-cho 30-4, Ishikari City (Sakyu no Kaze Museum), held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_romaji: Dai-hachigō Ishikari Momijiyama Yonjūkyūgō Iseki Shutsudo no Mokuseihin
name_en: No. 8 Wooden Artifacts Excavated from the Ishikari Momijiyama No. 49 Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of wooden artifacts excavated from the Ishikari Momijiyama No. 49 site (designation No. 8). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2015-07-24, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_en: No. 9 Gong of Ryutakuji Temple at Kotan
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the waniguchi (temple gong) of Ryutakuji Temple at Kotan (designation No. 9). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2016-10-27, located at Atsuta 98-2, Ishikari City (Ishikari Airoad Atsuta roadside station, 2nd floor), with a second location where it is deposited at the Hokkaido Museum, Onopporo, Atsubetsu-cho, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo City.

name_romaji: Dai-jūgō Momijiyama Sanjūsangō Iseki Shutsudo no Urushinuri Yumi (Monyō-iri)
name_en: No. 10 Lacquered Bow with Patterns Excavated from the Momijiyama No. 33 Site
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a lacquered bow with patterns excavated from the Momijiyama No. 33 site (designation No. 10). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ishikari City, designated on 2025-06-30, held by the Ishikari City Board of Education.

name_en: Habitat of the Red Crucian Carp at Tokotan Marsh, Akkeshi
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the habitat of the red crucian carp at Tokotan marsh in Akkeshi. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Shikotan Pine
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the Shikotan pine tree. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Old Cherry Tree
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of an old cherry tree. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Inverted Japanese Yew
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of an inverted Japanese yew tree. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Red Pine of the Ota Tonden Colony
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the red pine of the Ota tonden colony. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Mulberry Tree Row of the Ota Tonden Colony
description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the row of mulberry trees of the Ota tonden colony. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_romaji: Akkeshi Kamiiwa Toride Ato Oyobi Tateanagun
name_en: Akkeshi Kamiiwa Fort Site and Pit Dwelling Cluster
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Akkeshi Kamiiwa fort site and an associated cluster of pit dwellings. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Osonoyama Chashi Site Cluster
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a cluster of chashi (Ainu fortification) sites at Osonoyama. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Chikarakotan Pit Dwelling Cluster
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Chikarakotan pit dwelling cluster. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Horonitai Pit Dwelling Cluster
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Horonitai pit dwelling cluster. It is a town-designated cultural property of Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Ruunpe (Ainu Garment)
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of a ruunpe, a type of Ainu garment. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 1986-04-04, located at the Ainu Museum.

name_en: Five Shrine Treasures of Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of five shrine treasures of Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 1996-06-05, located at Shiraoi Hachiman Shrine.

name_en: Collection of Ainu Daily-Life Implements (Kodama Collection)
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (tangible) consisting of a collection of Ainu daily-life implements known as the Kodama Collection. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 2000-03-31, located at the Ainu Museum.

name_en: Kojohama Echigo Bon Dance
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Kojohama Echigo Bon dance. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, designated on 2000-10-03, maintained by the Kojohama Echigo Bon Dance Preservation Society.

name_en: Successors of Shiraoi Town Traditional Culture
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) recognizing successors of the traditional culture of Shiraoi Town. It is a town-designated cultural property of Shiraoi Town, with details recorded in a separate table.

name_en: Senkoen Garden
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of the Senkoen. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

name_en: Powder Magazine
description_en: This is a monument (historic site) consisting of a powder magazine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

name_en: Nopporo Dadai Kagura
description_en: This is a folk cultural property (intangible) consisting of the Nopporo Dadai kagura dance. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

name_en: Framed Tablet "Tsuigan School"
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a framed tablet inscribed "Tsuigan Gakko" (Tsuigan School). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.

name_romaji: Hengaku "Fūki wa Kugaku Rōryoku ni Ari"
name_en: Framed Tablet "Wealth Lies in Diligent Study and Toil"
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of a framed tablet inscribed with the motto "Wealth lies in diligent study and toil." It is a municipally designated cultural property of Ebetsu City.
